SELECT
WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                             
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
/*AND WNRCC.CONTEXT <> 'METRIX'*/
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE          
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
				/* AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'*/)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG Y 
	WHERE  WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = Y.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
	AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = Y.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID)

				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'C' 
				/* AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */)

				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE    
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
				 /* AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG Y 
	WHERE  WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = Y.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
	AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE

SELECT
WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNGL.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_LINES WNGL 
ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WNGL.COGS_PERCENT_ID
AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
WHERE
WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
/*AND WNRCC.CONTEXT IN ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY')*/
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   X WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNGL.LINE_ID 
	AND X.SS_CD = WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
	AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
	/*AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */)
UNION ALL
SELECT
WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNGL.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG                
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_LINES WNGL 
ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WNGL.COGS_PERCENT_ID
AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
WHERE
WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
/*AND WNRCC.CONTEXT IN ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY')*/
AND COALESCE(WNGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   X WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNGL.LINE_ID 
	AND X.SS_CD = WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
	AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
	/*AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */)

SELECT DISTINCT 
	EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT_ID, 
	EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID, 
	EOXRCP.ORG_ID, 
	EOXRCP.GL_DATE, 
	EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT, 
	EOXRCP.EDW_EXTRACTED_FLAG, 
	EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
	EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE10, 
	EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11, 
	EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE12, 
	EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE13, 
	EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME, 
	EOXRCP.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
	EOXRCP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	  EOXRCP.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WI.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRCP
	ON WI.COGS_PERCENT_ID   = EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT_ID
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  = EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND WI.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
WHERE 
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ITM EXI
		WHERE EXI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT                    
			AND EXI.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)			
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_FRT EXF
			WHERE EXF.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT              
			AND EXF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)			
/*OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ASN EXA
			WHERE  EXA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT              
			AND EXA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)*/

SELECT
WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG   
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
/*AND WNRCC.CONTEXT <> 'METRIX'*/
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP   X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE   
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
				 /* AND END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG Y 
	WHERE  WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = Y.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
	AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = Y.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID)

SELECT 
 WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID ,
 WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
 WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID,
 WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME,
 WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE, 
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ') THEN /* nnainala : Included ICMS-ADJ */
    CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
     NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
    ELSE
     CASE WHEN 
      CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN
      NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
     ELSE NULL      
     END
    END
  WHEN (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' ) THEN /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
    CASE WHEN 
     CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN
     NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
    ELSE NULL
    END
  ELSE  WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ') THEN /* nnainala : Included ICMS-ADJ */
    CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
       WNRCC_1.GL_DATE       
     ELSE
      CASE WHEN  
       CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN
         NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
        ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
      END
    END
  WHEN (WNRCC.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME NOT LIKE '%XAAS%') THEN /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
   CASE  WHEN 
    CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN
      NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
     ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
   END
  ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_VAL WNRCC_1     
  ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRCC_1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
  ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRCC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON WNRCC.ITEM_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
  ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
  AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
 WHERE
  WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' 
 /* AND WNRCC.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY < 0 */ 
 AND (WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME IS NULL  OR  WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  = 'UNKNOWN')                          
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/

SELECT 'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS, ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
  /* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */ 
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID  
  ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID 
  END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
  /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */ 
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME            
  ELSE WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME     
  END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  0 AS ACCTD_AMOUNT, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE , WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
  WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER, 'RAE_COGS' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
  0 AS AMOUNT, 1 AS BATCH_ID, NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  WNRCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID, WNRCC.COGS_PCT AS COGS_PERCENT,
  NULL AS COMMENTS, WNRCC.CONTEXT AS CONTEXT, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
  1 AS CREATED_BY, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE, NULL AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG, NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
  'REV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE, WNRCC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID, 'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
  WNRCC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
  WNRCC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE, WNRCC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME, NULL AS GROUPING_ID , NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  WNRCC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE, NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
  NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY, 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG, NULL AS LINE_PERCENT,
  SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,   NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
  NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID, 
  CASE  
  WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT   
  ELSE SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT 
  END AS ORDER_HEADER_ID ,  
  CASE WHEN  WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999  THEN      
  CASE WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT       
  ELSE NULL     
  END   
  ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID 
  END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  , WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   , WNRCC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
  NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  ESCT.QUOTA_FLAG AS QUOTA_FLAG ,   NULL AS REASON_CODE, NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
  NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID, 
  CASE WHEN WNRCC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
  ELSE 999  
  END AS  REQUEST_ID,
  /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  AS RULE_START_DATE, */ 
  CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE      
  ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE   
  END AS  RULE_START_DATE,
  SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
  
  /*prbobba : modified for SAAS Q3FY14*/
  /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS ADJ-WEBEX') 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%')) )  /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
    /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/
 )THEN 0 /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q3FY14*/
  ELSE SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT END AS SALESREP_ID ,  
  
  NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID, WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE ,
  SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  AS SPLIT_PERCENT , 
  
  /*prbobba : modified for SAAS Q3FY14*/
  /*KGUVVALA : modified for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
  CASE WHEN ( NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS ADJ-WEBEX') 
  OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%') ))  /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
  /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/
 ) THEN COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR2.TERRITORY_ID,  0)  
  ELSE SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT  END AS TERRITORY_ID  ,       
     
  /* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */ 
  CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 
  ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) 
  END AS TRANSACTION_DATE ,  'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,  
  CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' 
  and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN    NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY    
  ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY   
  END  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  , WNRCC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
  NULL AS TRX_NAME, WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER, WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRX_TYPE,
  NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE, NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE, 'RAE_COGS' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
  SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
  WNRCC.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
  FROM  $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRCP 
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = SRCP.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID 
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRCP.SS_CD 
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = SRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_LINES WNGL  
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WNGL.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WNGL.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_RULE WNGAR 
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID =  WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WNGAR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG WSCF 
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WSCF.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WSCF.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA  
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  /* use ST_OM_RA_RULES for rule_id : rchettri  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE   
  ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
  AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR   
  ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME  
  AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL  
  ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL  
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP  
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRCC.ITEM_KEY )  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP    SC_TV   
  ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WSCF.LINE_ID   
  AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE   
  AND SC_TV.SS_CD =  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  /* AND SC_TV.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC  
  ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT   
  AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE   
  AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC  
  ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT  
  on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT  
  AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC  
  ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT                
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE    
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC  
  ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD  ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID = WNRCC.FISCAL_ID */ 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM   
  ON  WNRCC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  
  
  /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q3FY14*/
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT  
  ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY 
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
  ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SHIPTO_CUSTOMER_PARTY_HIER MSC 
  ON (NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=MSC.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
  ON (NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=MSC.BRANCH_ISO_COUNTRY_CD)
  
  LEFT OUTER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP STMAP  
  ON STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME=NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME/*( 
  CASE WHEN NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_NAME=STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME THEN STMAP.SALES_COUNTRY_NAME ELSE 'UNITED STATES' END )existing logic in Q1FY14 webex saas RELEASE is commented due to duplicate issues*/ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR2               
  ON EST_INIT_VAR2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=COALESCE(STMAP.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,(SELECT SALES_TERRITORY_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_APSP_SALES_TERRITORY_MAP  WHERE SALES_COUNTRY_NAME='UNITED STATES'))/*added as a part of Q3FY14 Release*/
  AND EST_INIT_VAR2.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME   
  /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q3FY14*/
  
  WHERE 1=1 
  AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'               
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/

SELECT
EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NULL AS CONTEXT  
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE 
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE           
,NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       = 'LINE' THEN NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  WHEN NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE       = 'FREIGHT'  THEN NATFL.PRODUCT_KEY ELSE NULL END ITEM_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
,(CASE WHEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE >= CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) THEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END)  AS  GL_DATE_1
,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,CASE WHEN EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE13 = 'Y' THEN
	CASE WHEN 
		SUBSTR(ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) = '12' THEN 0
		ELSE EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT
		END
	ELSE EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT
	END COGS_PCT
,ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
,(CASE WHEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE >= CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) THEN NRAGD.GL_DTM ELSE CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE12 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY'  ) END) AS GL_POSTED_DATE
,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
,EOXRCP.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
FROM
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
 $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRCP

INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN   $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRCP  
	ON SRCP.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID             = EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT_ID
	AND  SRCP.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = SRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
	ON SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  = CAST(EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE10 AS INTEGER) 
	AND SATL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON NATL.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
	ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
	AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
	ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVGLCC
	ON (EVGLCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EOXRCP.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
	AND EVGLCC.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON EVGLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

/* commented : rchettri 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL 
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE NRASL
	ON NRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
	AND NRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE      
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
	ON (CASE WHEN EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT > 0 THEN NRASL.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ELSE NRASL.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY END) = NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY 
WHERE 
NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE10 IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE12 IS NOT NULL
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE13 IN ('Y', 'N')
AND NRAGD.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME  IN('UO','BO')
/* AND EOXRCP.GL_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE */  
/* used Greatest between GL_Date and Attribute11 to filter data for fiscal month :      rchettri */
AND GL_DATE_1	BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND NOT EXISTS 
               ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR   
				WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY   
				AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
				)
AND NOT EXISTS 
            ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
				WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY
				AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
			 )
			 
/* --ADDING EX FLOW -- */
UNION

	ON EVGLCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

/* commented : rchettri 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL 
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE NRASL
	ON NRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
	AND NRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE      
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
	ON (CASE WHEN EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT > 0 THEN NRASL.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ELSE NRASL.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY END) = NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY 
WHERE 
NAT.AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE10 IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 IS NOT NULL 
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE12 IS NOT NULL
AND EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE13 IN ('Y', 'N')
AND NRAGD.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME NOT IN('UO','BO')
AND  EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID in  (sel ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID from  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_COGS_DEFERRAL_R12_MIG)
/* AND EOXRCP.GL_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE */  
/* used Greatest between GL_Date and Attribute11 to filter data for fiscal month :      rchettri */
AND GL_DATE_1	BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND NOT EXISTS 
               ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR   
				WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY   
				AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
				)
AND NOT EXISTS 
            ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
				WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY
				AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='RAE_COGS'
			 )

SELECT
 'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
 ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
 
 /* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID
  ELSE SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
 
 /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
  ELSE WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME    
 END AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 
 0 AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
 WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
 WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
 'RAE_COGS' AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
 0 AS AMOUNT,
 1 AS BATCH_ID,
 NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 WNRCC.CODE_COMBINATION_ID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
 WNRCC.COGS_PCT AS COGS_PERCENT,
 NULL AS COMMENTS,
 WNRCC.CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
 1 AS CREATED_BY,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
 NULL AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
 WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT ,
 'REV' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
 WNRCC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
 'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
 WNRCC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)    AS GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
 WNRCC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
 WNRCC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
 NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
 NULL AS GROUPING_ID ,
 NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
 WNRCC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
 NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
 NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
 1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
 'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
 NULL AS LINE_PERCENT,
 NULL AS LINE_SEQ_ID  ,  
 NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
 NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
 SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
 WNGL.LINE_ID AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
 WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
 WNRCC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
 NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
 NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
 NULL AS REASON_CODE,
 NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
 NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999  END AS  REQUEST_ID,
 
 /* WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  AS RULE_START_DATE, */
 CASE WHEN WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE    
  ELSE WNRCC.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE  
 END AS  RULE_START_DATE,
 
 COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
 CASE WHEN WSCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
   ELSE COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
 END  AS SALESREP_ID ,  
 NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
 WSCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE , 
 100 AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,   
 COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_ID,0) AS TERRITORY_ID , 
 /* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */
 CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
 'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
    NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
   ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
 END  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
 WNRCC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
 NULL AS TRX_NAME,
 WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
 WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  AS TRX_TYPE,
 NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
 NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
 'RAE_COGS' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
 SRCP.COGS_PERCENT_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 WNRCC.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_COGS_PERCENT SRCP
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = SRCP.SK_COGS_PERCENT_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRCP.SS_CD
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = SRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_LINES WNGL
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WNGL.COGS_PERCENT_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WNGL.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_RULE WNGAR  
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID =  WNGAR.COGS_PERCENT_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNGAR.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WNGAR.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG WSCF
  ON WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WSCF.COGS_PERCENT_ID
  AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WSCF.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WSCF.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
  ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNRCC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
 
 /* use ST_OM_RA_RULES for rule_id : rchettri 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
  on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 */
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_RULE 
  ON SMRR_RULE.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNGAR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR 
  ON SMRR_CUR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
  AND SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNRCC.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
  ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNRCC.ITEM_KEY ) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
  on ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
  AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
  ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
  ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.' 
  AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
  ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE   
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
  ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 /* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD 
  ON WNRCC.FISCAL_ID =  EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
 */ 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
  ON  WNRCC.FISCAL_ID = NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
 WHERE
 1=1
 AND  WSCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT
WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
MIN(EOXRCP.GL_DATE) AS GL_DATE,
MAX(WNICE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_XXCFI_RAE_COGS_PERCNT EOXRCP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNICE
ON EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT_ID = WNICE.COGS_PERCENT_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WNICE.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = WNICE.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE NRASL
ON NRASL.SK_SCHEDULE_LINE_ID_INT = EOXRCP.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
AND NRASL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJSTMNT_GL_DSTRBTN NRAGD
ON (CASE WHEN EOXRCP.COGS_PERCENT > 0 THEN NRASL.RU_CREDIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY ELSE NRASL.RU_DEBIT_RAE_ADJ_GL_DIST_KEY END) = NRAGD.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_GL_DSTRBTN_KEY 

WHERE  (CASE WHEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE > CAST ( EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 as TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) THEN EOXRCP.GL_DATE 
                              ELSE CAST ( EOXRCP.ATTRIBUTE11 as TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY' ) END) IS NOT NULL
AND NRAGD.GL_POSTED_FLG = 'Y'
AND EOXRCP.GLOBAL_NAME IN ('UO','BO')
GROUP BY WNICE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

SELECT
 WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID ,
 WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
 WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID,
 CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
 WHEN (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS ADJ-WEBEX') 
 OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE ANY ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%','CSP-MARKETPLACE') OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME IN ('ORDER MANAGEMENT') AND NATL_ADJ.TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME LIKE ANY ('%XAAS%') ))  /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*//*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/ 
 /* CSP-MARKETPLACE added :AWS New Batch Source Addition : Q4FY19*/) THEN -9999 
 /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q3FY14*/
 /*KGUVVALA: added for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
 ELSE
 CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
 ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END  
 END AS LINE_ID,
 CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
 ELSE
 /* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RRCHETTRI */
 CASE WHEN WNRCC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
 END AS ORDER_NUMBER
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
 /* satchinn : LOT2B Modifications
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
 ON NAATLA.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY */
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON  WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
 ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WNRCC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
 ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
 AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
 ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON WNRCC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
 ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 /*prbobba : added for SAAS Q3FY14*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ /*Added-OR: TNC Feb 2020 Release*/
 ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNRCC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/

SELECT
WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID
,WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
,WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID
,WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNRCC.CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN WNRCC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE  
, NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN WNRCC.CONTEXT = 'METRIX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END METRIX_FLAG           
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG         				
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_CUR WNRCC
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_RAE_COG_SLS_CRED_FLG Y 
	WHERE  WNRCC.COGS_PERCENT_ID = Y.COGS_PERCENT_ID 
	AND WNRCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = Y.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	AND WNRCC.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID = Y.SCHEDULE_LINE_ID)
